name: To The Stars Academy Launches with a UAP Science and Government Team
summary: To The Stars Academy of Arts & Science launched publicly with former government officials, aerospace specialists, and researchers focused on UAP, advanced aerospace concepts, and government transparency. Hal Puthoff served as co-founder and Vice President of Science and Technology.

relationships.context: National Security Affairs Advisor and former government official
Co-founder and Vice President of Science and Technology
Director of Global Security and Special Programs at launch
